output.rationale: The user targets a specific Reddit listing page with a time-based sort (top posts). Browser is the right tool because Reddit's top posts are dynamically rendered and require navigating the site's native sort/filter UI. A single browse will surface all 5 titles; distiller will extract them into a clean list.

metadata.label: b_reddit
metadata.goal: On the r/LocalLLaMA top posts page, extract the titles of the top 5 posts visible in the listing. Report each title verbatim and declare done.

metadata.label: d_titles
metadata.question: Extract the 5 post titles from the raw page text. Return them as a numbered list: post_1_title, post_2_title, ..., post_5_title. Do NOT emit successors.
